message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title PD parse detail
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam noteFontColor black
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor black
skinparam participantPadding 5
skinparam lifelineStrategy nosolid
skinparam activationBorderColor black
skinparam activationBackgroundColor #FFCCCB
skinparam arrowColor black
skinparam arrowThickness 1
skinparam boxPadding 5
skinparam boxBorderColor black
skinparam boxBackgroundColor #F0F8FF

box "Chi" #LightBlue
participant Chi
end box

box "pipeline" #LightBlue
participant pipeline
end box

box "pdlibwrapper\ncamxpdlibwrapper.cpp" #LightBlue
participant pdlibwrapper
end box

box "pdlibinterface\ncamxpdlibinterface.cpp" #LightBlue
participant pdlibinterface
end box

box "camxsensornode.cpp" #LightBlue
participant camxsensornode
end box

box "camxpdlibraryhandler.cpp" #LightBlue
participant camxpdlibraryhandler
end box

== chi stats algo ==

note over Chi
ChiPDEntry[] = "ChiPDLibraryEntry"
ChiASEntry[] = "ChiASDAlgorithmEntry"
ChiAFDEntry[] = "ChiAFDAlgorithmEntry"
ChiAWBEntry[] = "ChiAWBAlgorithmEntry"
ChiAFEntry[] = "ChiAFAlgorithmEntry"
from this text, can get Algorithm Entry
end note

== PD lib create ==

activate Chi
Chi -> Chi: ProbeChiComponents
Chi -> Chi: GetAECAlgorithmCallback
Chi -> Chi: GetAFDAlgorithmCallback
Chi -> Chi: GetAFAlgorithmCallback
Chi -> Chi: GetAWBAlgorithmCallback
Chi -> Chi: GetASDAlgorithmCallback
Chi -> Chi: GetPDLibraryCallback
Chi -> Chi: GetHVXAlgorithmCallback
Chi -> Chi: return
deactivate Chi

note over Chi
These Callback used in camxpipeline.cpp
when call pipeline:CreateNodes
end note

note over Chi
for m_pStatscallback.pPDCallback
contain these interface
pCallbacks->pfnGetCapabilities = PDWrapperGetCapabilities;
pCallbacks->pfnCreate = CreatePDLibWrapper;
pCallbacks->pfnQueryVendorTag = NULL;
pCallbacks->pfnSetAlgoInterface = PDWrapperSetNodeInterface;
end note

== CreatePDLibWrapper ==

pipeline -> pdlibwrapper: CamX::LoadPDLib
activate pdlibwrapper
note right of pdlibwrapper
"%s%s%s.%s"
"VendorLibPath"
"PathSeparator"
"pLibName"
"SharedLibraryExtension"
end note
pdlibwrapper -> pdlibwrapper: return Addr
pdlibwrapper -> pdlibwrapper: pfnCreate
pdlibwrapper -> pipeline: return
deactivate pdlibwrapper

== call PD lib ==

note over pdlibwrapper
in dir:
1. camx-lib-3a/system/statsalgo/pdlib
2. camx-lib/system/statsalgo/pdlibsony
both have camxpdlibinterface.cpp
end note

== Init PDLib ==

note over pipeline
for pipeline create, will create every node
and pdlib is init in sensor node
end note

pipeline -> camxsensornode: ProcessingNodeFinalizeInitialization
activate camxsensornode
note right of camxsensornode
1. ReadEEPROMData
2. GetCSIInfo
3. GetOTPData
4. PopulatePDAFInformation
5. PublishPDAFInformation
why we need publish this info?
actually for PropertyIDSensorPDAFInfo, in IFE PDPCv1.1 and BPS PDPC2.0 will use it.
since type 3 sensor will not do pdpc
end note
camxsensornode -> camxpdlibraryhandler: LoadPDLibrary
activate camxpdlibraryhandler
camxpdlibraryhandler -> camxpdlibraryhandler: CPDLibHandler::CreateLib
deactivate camxpdlibraryhandler
deactivate camxsensornode

@enduml
```
